commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ac1f3f53ab266376d8642cc942345d74236f1290)
commands.review_summary:
The PR detects `devin … acp` launches, advertises Windsurf-compatible initialization metadata for them, accepts ACP vendor extension notifications, and adds integration tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at medium confidence. Current main demonstrably sends generic acpx identity, and the reported real Devin run says the patch advances past the prior Windsurf-version rejection, but the external response and before/after transcript are not independently inspectable.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A maintainer should approve or narrow the long-term Windsurf emulation contract after the contributor supplies required harness docs and inspectable live proof.

target.title: Fix Devin ACP compatibility
target.body:
## Summary
- Detect Devin ACP launches and advertise Windsurf-compatible client info/capabilities only for that adapter
- Accept vendor extension notifications so Devin's _cognition.ai notifications do not produce method-not-found noise
- Add integration coverage for Devin client identity and extension notifications

## Verification
- pnpm run build:test && node --test dist-test/test/integration.test.js --test-name-pattern 'exec --no-terminal disables advertised terminal capability|exec accepts agent extension notifications|Devin ACP launch advertises Windsurf client info' (runs full integration file: 84/84 passed)
- pnpm run build
- node dist/cli.js --cwd /Users/livio/Documents/liza --timeout 60 --format quiet --agent 'devin --model swe-1-6 acp' exec 'Reply with exactly: custom-acp-swe16-ok' (now reaches Devin service and returns ResourceExhausted quota instead of failed_precondition/Windsurf out-of-date)
- pnpm run typecheck
- pnpm run lint
target.author: liviogama

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
